title: Farmer's Pizzeria
description: Pizza addon for Farmer's Delight and Brewin' And Chewin'
body:
Farmer's Pizzeria is an addon mod for Farmer's Delight and Brewin' And Chewin'.

With this mod you can now make different kinds of pizzas. While most of the ingredients are taken from either mods or Minecraft, this mod also adds some of it's own new ingredients like Dorblu Cheese, Salami, and Basil.

[ ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-pizzeria)[![discord-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://discord.com/invite/U49kcYmZ8U)

Dependencies

📩Farmer's Delight(Required)

📩Brewin' And Chewin'(Required)

📩JEI(For viewing recipes, optional)

Contribution

You can contribute to the project by submitting translations, assets or any ideas on my Discord server.
